author: CasaOS Team
description:
Imagine having all your movies, TV shows, and music at your fingertips, ready on any device. Jellyfin transforms your media collection into a personalized entertainment hub, surpassing traditional photo albums. Your media is accessible anywhere and beautifully organized.

Jellyfin is free and open-source, offering high-quality streaming, detailed metadata, and personalized recommendations. Multiple users can have their own media libraries.

Deploying Jellyfin on private cloud devices like Zima provides virtually unlimited storage, seamless streaming, and secure, multi-device access. It's perfect for NAS enthusiasts looking to enhance their home media setup.

releaseNotes.en_US:
- v10.10.6 includes bug fixes for Jellyfin Server.
- The release fixes Apple silicon crashes by bumping the .NET framework version to 8.0.13.
- Fixes include subnet checks, image encoding concurrency, SchedulesDirect image prefetching, Live TV guide backdrops, and websocket state locking.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- v10.10.6 includes bug fixes for Jellyfin Server.
- The release fixes Apple silicon crashes by bumping the .NET framework version to 8.0.13.
- Fixes include subnet checks, image encoding concurrency, SchedulesDirect image prefetching, Live TV guide backdrops, and websocket state locking.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- v10.10.6 include correzioni di bug per Jellyfin Server.
- La versione risolve i crash del silicio Apple da bumping la versione del framework .NET a 8.0.13.
- Le correzioni includono controlli della sottorete, concorrenza nella codifica delle immagini, precaricamento delle immagini SchedulesDirect, sfondi della guida live TV e blocco dello stato del websocket.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- v10.10.6 inkluderer feilrettinger for Jellyfin Server.
- Utgivelsen fikser Apple silisiumkrasj ved å bumping rammeversjonen .NET til 8.0.13.
- Rettelser inkluderer undernettsjekker, samtidig bildekoding, forhåndshenting av SchedulesDirect-bilder, Live TV-guidebakgrunner og nettsocket-tilstandslåsing.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:
- v10.10.6 包含 Jellyfin Server 的错误修复。
- 该版本通过将 .NET framework 版本提升到 8.0.13 修复了 Apple silicon 崩溃问题。
- 修复内容包括子网检查、图像编码并发、SchedulesDirect 图像预取、Live TV 指南背景图和 websocket 状态锁定。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- v10.10.6 には Jellyfin Server のバグ修正が含まれます。
- .NET framework を 8.0.13 に上げることで Apple silicon のクラッシュを修正します。
- 修正には、サブネットチェック、画像エンコードの並行処理、SchedulesDirect 画像のプリフェッチ、Live TV ガイド背景、websocket 状態ロックが含まれます。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- v10.10.6에는 Jellyfin Server의 버그 수정이 포함됩니다.
- 이 릴리스는 .NET framework 버전을 8.0.13으로 올려 Apple silicon 충돌을 수정합니다.
- 수정 사항에는 서브넷 검사, 이미지 인코딩 동시성, SchedulesDirect 이미지 사전 가져오기, Live TV 가이드 배경, websocket 상태 잠금이 포함됩니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- v10.10.6 inclut des corrections de bugs pour Jellyfin Server.
- Cette version corrige les plantages sur Apple silicon en mettant à jour le framework .NET vers 8.0.13.
- Les correctifs couvrent les vérifications de sous-réseau, la concurrence d'encodage d'image, le préchargement d'images SchedulesDirect, les arrière-plans du guide Live TV et le verrouillage d'état websocket.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- v10.10.6 enthält Fehlerkorrekturen für Jellyfin Server.
- Das Release behebt Abstürze auf Apple Silicon durch Anhebung der .NET-Framework-Version auf 8.0.13.
- Korrekturen betreffen Subnetzprüfungen, gleichzeitige Bildcodierung, SchedulesDirect-Bildvorabruf, Live-TV-Guide-Hintergründe und Websocket-Zustandssperren.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- v10.10.6 inkluderar buggfixar för Jellyfin Server.
- Utgåvan fixar Apples kiselkraschar genom att bumping ramversionen .NET till 8.0.13.
- Fixningar inkluderar undernätskontroller, samtidig bildkodning, SchedulesDirect-bildförhämtning, Live TV-guidebakgrunder och webbsocket-tillståndslåsning.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- Το v10.10.6 περιλαμβάνει διορθώσεις σφαλμάτων για τον διακομιστή Jellyfin.
- Η έκδοση διορθώνει τα σφάλματα πυριτίου της Apple κατά bumping την έκδοση πλαισίου .NET σε 8.0.13.
- Οι επιδιορθώσεις περιλαμβάνουν ελέγχους υποδικτύου, ταυτόχρονη κωδικοποίηση εικόνας, προανάκτηση εικόνας SchedulesDirect, σκηνικά οδηγών Live TV και κλείδωμα κατάστασης υποδοχής ιστού.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:
- v10.10.6 uključuje ispravke grešaka za Jellyfin poslužitelj.
- Izdanje popravlja Apple silicon padove od strane bumping verzije okvira .NET na 8.0.13.
- Popravci uključuju provjere podmreže, konkurentnost kodiranja slike, SchedulesDirect prethodno dohvaćanje slike, Live TV pozadine vodiča i zaključavanje stanja web-utičnice.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- v10.10.6 inclui correções de bugs para o Jellyfin Server.
- A versão corrige as falhas de silício da Apple de bumping a versão da estrutura .NET para 8.0.13.
- As correções incluem verificações de sub-rede, simultaneidade de codificação de imagem, pré-pesquisa de imagem SchedulesDirect, cenários de separador Live TV e bloqueio de estado de websocket.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- v10.10.6 включает исправления ошибок для Jellyfin Server.
- В выпуске исправлены сбои Apple Silicon от bumping версии платформы .NET до 8.0.13.
- Исправления включают проверку подсети, параллельное кодирование изображений, предварительную выборку изображения SchedulesDirect, фоновые руководства Live TV и блокировку состояния веб-сокета.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:
- v10.10.6 Jellyfin Sunucusu için hata düzeltmeleri içerir.
- Sürüm, Apple silikon çökmelerini bumping ile .NET çerçeve sürümünden 8.0.13 olarak düzeltir.
- Düzeltmeler arasında alt ağ kontrolleri, görüntü kodlama eşzamanlılığı, SchedulesDirect görüntünün önceden getirilmesi, Canlı TV kılavuz arka planları ve websocket durumu kilitleme yer alıyor.

title: Jellyfin(Nvidia GPU)
